message: Removed LINQ Reverse buffering from map validation and shape metering walks; added map traversal BenchmarkDotNet coverage.

Inspected SandboxValueValidator and SandboxValueShapeMeter map traversal: LINQ Reverse() materialization removed; traversal now pushes key/value frames directly without per-map reverse buffer. Semantics remain order-insensitive for validation/metering outcomes. Inspected benchmarks/SafeIR.Benchmarks/Core/MapTraversalBenchmarks.cs: adds MemoryDiagnoser coverage for validator and metering at 100, 1,000, and 10,000 map entries. Focused collection/map tests passed 54/54. Benchmark build passed with 0 warnings/errors. Queue health before verify returned doctor ok.
command: dotnet test tests/SafeIR.Tests/SafeIR.Tests.csproj --filter 'FullyQualifiedName~Collection|FullyQualifiedName~Map'; dotnet build benchmarks/SafeIR.Benchmarks/SafeIR.Benchmarks.csproj; ./scripts/agentq.ps1 doctor
